governing_rule: A control is not proven because it exists in code. A control is PROVEN only when all 8 matrix conditions hold: positive, negative, boundary, mutation, replay, freshness, provenance, reproducible.

status_legend.PROVEN: positive + negative + all 8 matrix conditions, evidence on file
status_legend.PARTIAL: has positive+negative (or a real prior proof) but not the full 8-condition matrix
status_legend.DECLARED: policy exists; not yet built or not yet independently proven (ASSERTED)

note: Status is OBSERVED where an evidence pointer exists, otherwise ASSERTED. This registry will not fake its own completion.
